description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and a spacious, open-plan layout with large floor-to-ceiling windows on multiple sides, allowing for abundant natural light. The exterior is clad in light wood paneling, complemented by white window frames and railings. A prominent outdoor deck area includes a swimming pool and a sunken hot tub, with a green terrace and outdoor seating. The interior is visible through the expansive glass, revealing multiple rooms, including a kitchen, living area, and bathrooms, all arranged on a single level. The structure is elevated on short stilts at one end, with a staircase leading up to the main entrance. Lush potted plants and modern outdoor furniture enhance the contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with flat roofs, large glass windows, wood paneling, and an outdoor pool deck.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, outdoor pool, hot tub, green terrace, and large glass windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wood paneling, multiple large windows, and the pool area extending from the deck.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade with grouped windows, a small stairway, and the overall rectangular structure.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the staircase, side deck, and the integration of indoor and outdoor spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on multiple facades
